title: Dri-Pak Bicarb Cream 500 Ml, Pack of 6
features: Contains a plant-based surfactant for extra cleaning power
Can be used on granite and marble worktops
Ideal for cleaning sinks, baths and cooker hobs
description: Product Description Bicarb Cream is Dri-Pak's latest addition to the 'Clean and Natural' range. It is a non-toxic multi-surface cream cleaner draws on the powerful but gentle abrasive properties of Bicarbonate of Soda to deep clean surfaces around the home without the risk of scratching. It's a versatile multi-surface cream cleaner that's ideal for cleaning sinks, baths and cooker hobs. It's mildly abrasive and is ideal for cleaning the grime off uPVC. It contains a plant-based surfactant for extra cleaning power. It will not scratch surfaces and is suitable for use on aluminium, chrome, jewellery, plastic, porcelain, silver, stainless steel and tin. Unlike acid-based cleaners, Bicarb Cream can be used on granite and marble worktops. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Hydrogen Carbonate, Calcium Magnesium Carbonate, Decyl Glucoside, Xantham Gum.
